legacy_original.goal: PCM buffer derives from real decoded audio frame data

methods: convert(const DecodedFrame& frame, const PcmFormat& target_format)
current_interface.responsibility: Convert decoded audio frames to PCM format

current_implementation.notes: Converts audio frames but may not handle all format conversions accurately

current_test_coverage.reality_proof: Uses real sine wave audio data for conversion tests

reality_proof_requirements.real_audio_data: PCM buffer must derive from actual decoded audio frame data
reality_proof_requirements.real_sample_conversion: Must convert actual samples, not generate placeholder silence
reality_proof_requirements.real_format_handling: Must handle actual sample formats (s16, s32, flt, dbl)
reality_proof_requirements.no_placeholder_proof: Cannot generate silent PCM buffer as proof
reality_proof_requirements.sample_accuracy: Converted samples must be accurate (not all zeros)

required_reality_tests: Real Audio Data Conversion Test: Convert actual decoded audio frame with real samples
Real Sample Accuracy Test: Verify converted samples are accurate (not all zeros)
Real Format Handling Test: Handle actual sample formats (s16, s32, flt, dbl)
Real Channel Mapping Test: Handle actual channel configurations
No Placeholder Proof Test: Verify no silent PCM buffer generation
Timestamp Preservation Test: Verify presentation timestamp preserved
test_requirements: All tests must use real DecodedFrame with actual audio data
No mock frames or stub conversions
Tests must verify actual sample conversion (not just interface contract)
Evidence must prove real PCM derivation, not just interface

decision_ledger_requirements.conversion_decision: Input: frame, format; Output: success, sample_count, bytes_per_sample

schema_gate_requirements.output_pcm_required: output_pcm must not be empty for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.sample_accuracy_required: sample_accuracy must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.format_correctness_required: format_correctness must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.anti_fake_validation: no placeholder silence or dummy PCM

real_pcm_derivation_proof: Real audio data: DecodedFrame contains actual audio samples
Real sample conversion: Conversion produces non-zero output
Real format handling: Output format matches target format
Real channel mapping: Channel configuration handled correctly
Real timestamp preservation: Presentation timestamp preserved

workspace_requirements: No generated audio files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real PCM conversion with real audio data
BLOCKED_ENV: No real audio sample available
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real conversion without real audio data
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim sample accuracy without real verification
Never claim format correctness without real verification

legacy_original.reason: PCM converter reality audit planned. Current interface is stub implementation (CONTRACT_PASS). Real PCM conversion with real audio data required for RUNTIME_PASS. No placeholder silence or dummy PCM allowed.
